indexing.paragraph: Projects
Project: Worldlink
Description: an M&E & GMS app used for donor and award management, data collection, and progress tracking of field programs.
Tech Stack: JS, Angular, AngularJS, PHP, Laravel, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Jasmine (unit testing), Docker, Azure App Services, RESTful APIs, Bitbucket Pipelines (CI/CD)
Project: Ecosystem
Description: an application for household and children-under-sponsorship management.
Tech Stack: React, .NET Core, C#, Entity Framework Core, AWS (EC2/S3), REST APIs, Figma (UI/UX design)
Project: AiQA

Description: an AI-powered QA application that reviews letters and cards written by sponsored children to their sponsors; integrates Playwright for browser automation and OpenAI for content validation, running the full set of QA checks and approving submissions without human intervention.
Tech Stack: Playwright, OpenAI API (GPT-4), Node.js/TypeScript, Prompt Engineering
Project: Vision

Description: a software tool that utilizes AI (Azure Computer Vision) for face and body recognition, and performs automatic processing of child photos from field offices to reposition and align them according to the org standards.
Tech Stack: Pug, jQuery, Node.js, Express, MSSQL, Axios, Mocha, Chai, Azure Computer Vision API, Docker
Project: OVAS

Description: a volunteer management platform designed for FH staff to register and manage volunteers who do not have email addresses; it allows assigning unique IDs, linking with devices, and generating scannable badges.
Tech Stack: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React Query, React Router, QR/barcode generation library, REST APIs
Project: ExportEd

Description: a custom standalone Node.js middleware which listens to platform events from Salesforce, runs a SOQL-based ETL process, generates zipped CSV outputs, and writes processed data back to Salesforce.
Tech Stack: Node.js, Salesforce Platform Events, SOQL, Salesforce REST/Bulk API, JSZip, Cron scheduling
Project: Salesforce CRM
Description: CRM used to manage sponsors, children, sponsorships, and donations, enabling tracking and dynamic association between sponsors and beneficiaries.
Tech Stack: Apex, Lightning Web Components (LWC), SOQL, Batching tool, Salesforce Flow, Salesforce Data Loader
